gist.headline: Polyglot Pollinations
gist.blurb: MLALab.ai just joined the community showcase. They're using Pollinations to generate scene images for AI multi-language video dubbing, proving the hive speaks every language.
gist.summary: Added MLALab.ai to the community apps showcase under the Learn category.
gist.impact: Users can now discover MLALab.ai, a multi-language video dubbing tool powered by Pollinations images, in the community directory.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as a film director with a retro TV/monitor showing speech bubbles or film strips, representing multi-language video dubbing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, sitting next to a chunky retro TV monitor displaying a film strip and colorful speech bubbles. The monitor glows with soft lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
